title: taraxacum caespitans
intro: Taraxacum caespitans, also known as the creeping dandelion or dandelion of the alps, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum caespitans include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce blood pressure, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum caespitans can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
